# Callout

A highlighted content block for emphasizing important information — programs, services, key announcements. Supports single or multiple callouts, different themes, alignments, and optional background images.

## Single Callout

<Canvas of={CalloutStories.CalloutSingle} />
<Controls of={CalloutStories.CalloutSingle} />

## Two Callouts

Two callouts display side-by-side. On mobile they stack vertically.

<Canvas of={CalloutStories.CalloutDouble} />

## Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'optional')}

## Usage

- Use callouts to highlight 2–3 key programs, services, or initiatives
- Keep headings concise (3–5 words) and body text to 1–2 sentences
- Use button links for primary actions, text links for secondary
- Choose center alignment for short content, left for longer text
- Avoid more than 3–4 callouts in one container
- Don't use callouts for critical navigation or lengthy content
